summary: Frontend-only regression + verification of the new Infrastructure section, updated Features/Services/PoP icons, and language toggle. All 4 Unsplash images load (naturalWidth=1000, complete=true), all icons render as SVGs, journey strip shows 01-04, EN/ID toggle switches translations correctly. No console errors. Existing flows (service modal, pricing tabs, FAQ accordion, WhatsApp CTAs) all working.
verified_features: infrastructure-section renders between Features and Services (verified via scroll order & screenshot)
infra-card-dc: image loaded (naturalWidth=1000, height=561), Warehouse icon SVG, title 'Fasilitas Data Center' / 'Data Center Facility'
infra-card-servers: image loaded (1000x667), ServerCog SVG, title 'Server & Compute' / 'Servers & Compute'
infra-card-fiber: image loaded (1000x750), Cable SVG, title 'Konektivitas Fiber' / 'Fiber Connectivity'
infra-card-network: image loaded (1000x665), Globe2 SVG, title 'Jaringan Global' / 'Global Network'
infra-journey shows 4 numbered steps 01-04 with translated text in both languages
Language toggle EN/ID via [data-testid=lang-toggle] switches infra title from 'Empat lapisan yang menopang operasional digital Anda' -> 'Four layers that keep your digital business online'
Features section 4 cards each with SVG icon (Wallet, HeadphonesIcon, Network for 'Koneksi Stabil', Gauge for 'SLA 99,5%')
All 8 Service cards render SVG icons (Cloud, LayoutTemplate, Container, Warehouse, Server, HandCoins, ShieldCheck, Waypoints)
PoP APJII card SVG icon (Waypoints) present
Service modal opens on card click; contains 16 WhatsApp deeplinks all with 6287812397187
Pricing tabs (tab-dedicated / tab-colocation / tab-interconnect) switch content correctly
FAQ accordion first item toggles aria-expanded=true
No console errors on full page load & interactions
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: Infrastructure card DC uses Warehouse icon inside CARDS array – acceptable (physical facility metaphor). If a more DC-specific icon is desired later, consider ServerCog+Building2 combo; not a defect.
MINOR: Infrastructure images use Unsplash CDN – LCP could benefit from width/height attrs on (currently only absolute-positioned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Infrastructure section works end-to-end. Language toggle testid is [data-testid=lang-toggle]. Pricing tabs use testids tab-dedicated/tab-colocation/tab-interconnect (not pricing-tab-*). FAQ items have no individual testids but faq-section contains buttons that toggle aria-expanded correctly.
